branchPrompt.title: Please select a branch
branchPrompt.subtitle: Choose a branch to start selling at the POS.
branchPrompt.noBranches: No branches yet. Add a branch in shop settings.

tax.priceIncludesTaxHint: Item prices include tax (per shop policy).

cart.title: Order
cart.tableOpsToggle: Merge tables · Split items · Merge bills
cart.mergeGroupHint: Merged tables let you open each table’s order quickly. By default you still pay per order (pick tab/table → Pay). For one shared invoice use Merge group bills (other orders will be cancelled).
cart.emptyCartHint: Tap a product to add to the order
cart.noPayPermission: You cannot take payment. Use Hold / Save so a cashier can finish.
cart.sectionCustomerDesc: Find a member or record a walk-in guest.
cart.sectionTableDesc: Assign a table, merge tables, or split items when needed.
cart.sectionNoteDesc: Internal note for kitchen or cashier.
cart.checkoutConfirmDesc: Review items, totals, and payment method before completing.
cart.noProductsFoundHint: Try another category or search term
cart.shipCodHint: Ship COD: order stays pending collection on delivery. After collection go to Orders → Pay to update.
cart.transferProofHint: Optional: attach a screenshot of the successful transfer to save with the order.
cart.invoicePreviewDraftDesc: Draft — order code and timestamps appear after you confirm payment.
cart.invoicePreviewTaxUpdating: Updating tax — grand total on the invoice may change briefly.
cart.invoiceAfterPaymentDesc: Review content, then print the invoice.
cart.postSaleDesc: Loyalty only applies if a customer was selected before payment. You can skip this step.
cart.mergeTablesDesc: Merge tables into one group for faster POS handling. One shared invoice (if needed) uses Merge group bills in the cart.
cart.splitDesc: Choose quantities to move to a new order (optional destination table).
cart.moveTableDesc: Pick the destination table to move the current order.

customerDisplay.title: Customer display
customerDisplay.subtitle: Live view of the current basket so customers can follow along at the counter.
customerDisplay.qrHint: Guests can scan this QR code to make a bank transfer using the branch payment setup.
customerDisplay.missingLinkHint: Open this page from the Customer display button inside POS so it connects to the correct selling session.
customerDisplay.waitingHint: After the cashier opens the customer display from POS or starts adding items, the order will appear here.
customerDisplay.emptyHint: Items added in POS will appear live on this screen.

receipt.draftFooter: Preview — totals match after you confirm payment.

toast.shopLocked: Shop is locked. Cannot create, pay, or change orders.
toast.tableOrderLoaded: Loaded open order for this table.
toast.orderDeletedByOther: Order {{code}} was deleted by someone else.
toast.orderPaidByOther: Order {{code}} was paid by someone else.
toast.orderCancelledByOther: Order {{code}} was cancelled by someone else.
toast.selectAtLeastTwoTables: Select at least two tables to merge.
toast.splitSuccess: Items split to a new order.
toast.attachCustomerSuccess: Customer created and linked to order.
toast.selectBranchForOrderCode: Select a branch to open order by code.
toast.orderAlreadyOpenTab: Order is already open on another tab.
toast.openOrderFailed: Could not open order (paid or wrong branch).
toast.customerDisplayUnavailable: Cannot initialize the customer display on this device.
toast.customerDisplayPopupBlocked: Your browser blocked the popup. Allow popups to open the customer display.
toast.transferProofUploadWarning: Order paid but proof image failed to upload. Add it from Orders.
toast.orderCreatedUnpaid: Order created but not paid yet.
toast.checkoutCodSuccess: Order created — COD pending. Confirm collection under Orders.

confirm.mergeGroupBills: Merge group bills: other orders in the group will be cancelled and all items merge into the current order. Continue?
